metadata.title: France EOR Services | Employer of Record France – Jackson & Frank
metadata.description: France EOR and Employer of Record France services. Hire employees in France without entity. French employment laws 2026, France payroll outsourcing, URSSAF compliance, visa support. Onboard in 2–3 days. Book a demo.
keywords: hire employees in France without entity

faqs.title: France EOR FAQs
faqs.subtitle: Quick answers on cost, timeline, legal risks, and contracts for Employer of Record in France.

items.question: How much does France EOR cost?
items.answer: France EOR pricing typically includes a monthly management fee per employee plus the cost of salary, benefits, employer URSSAF contributions, and taxes. At Jackson & Frank we offer transparent pricing with no hidden fees. Total cost depends on headcount, salary levels, and benefits. Book a demo for a custom quote.

items.question: How fast can I hire someone in France with EOR?
items.answer: With Jackson & Frank France EOR, you can onboard new hires in 2–3 business days once we have signed contracts and employee details. No local entity is required, so you avoid months of setup time.

items.question: What are the legal risks of hiring in France without an entity?
items.answer: When you use a compliant France EOR like Jackson & Frank, the EOR is the legal employer in France. They assume employment law, URSSAF, tax, and compliance risk. You avoid misclassification, permanent establishment, and local registration issues as long as you work with a licensed, established provider.

items.question: What type of employment contract does France EOR use?
items.answer: Employees are hired under a French employment contract (contrat de travail) compliant with French law (Code du Travail), including notice periods, collective agreements (conventions collectives), severance pay, and mandatory benefits. Jackson & Frank issues the contract from our French entity so it is fully local and enforceable.

items.question: Can you sponsor visas for France EOR employees?
items.answer: Yes. We support visa sponsorship and the Talent Passport (Passeport Talent) program in France, plus work permits and residence permit coordination through préfectures, so you can hire non-EU talent through our France EOR.
